2272720.name: EXODIUM Part 1
2272720.description:
World

The late 21st century. Science and technology now make it possible to record a human personality into a computer or connect microelectronic modules directly to the living brain. The consequences of ecological disasters and nuclear war have intertwined, creating a bizarre web of climatic and social anomalies. Civilization has come to the brink of destruction: industry lies in ruins, warfare and epidemics have claimed the lives of billions.

Locations and Characters

But even among the ruins of the old world, the struggle continues. In the corridors of military bases and secret research laboratories, their inhabitants struggle to survive: soldiers, scientists, sentient machines, and genetic prototypes whose existence became possible only through a mix of progress and despair. Alongside them are those whose lives are marked by no heroic deeds — people trapped in a closed circle of circumstances where choice is often only an illusion. Their tragedies form the backdrop against which events unfold.

Story

At the heart of this story lie the relationships between humans and artificial intelligence, the fates of the prototypes, and the clash between conscience and duty. Machines search for their own identity, people struggle to find their place between the created and the born, and soldiers continue to hunt for enemies even where they may no longer exist.

Meaning and Goals

This game is not about battles for resources or territory, but about trust and its boundaries, about the consequences of choice and the price of self-awareness. Every word and every action becomes a step into the future of the characters, and the interpretation of these steps may differ for every player.

Explore, Encounter, Experience

  • Explore the enclosed spaces of military bases and research stations, where the past has sometimes left the most unexpected traces.

  • Engage in tense dialogues and philosophical disputes, where a word may help more than a bullet.

  • Meet artificial intelligence, awakened to self-awareness and stripped of its primary directives.

  • Encounter genetic prototypes, whose dramas will make you question conventional notions of humanity.

  • Experience the shifting pace: from thoughtful exploration and silence to sudden danger and explosive action.

Gameplay

A story-driven third-person adventure shooter with multiple playable characters.
2272720.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 德语, 俄语
